reviews.comment:
2 horas de espera para cargar combustible. Los trabajadores le piden permiso a una pierna para mover la otra. Poco personal para tanta demanda de clientes.

(Translated by Google)
A two-hour wait to refuel. Workers ask permission from one leg to move the other. Too few staff members to cope with such high customer demand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQydHMyTGxBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Demasiada demora e inseguridad en en abastecimiento de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Too many delays and uncertainty in fuel supply
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQycW9fOVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Se llena de extranjeros y se queda sin combustible a locales, el shop de compras no recibe la app de YPF, por lo general son amables pero hay una flaca muy mal humorada al turno mañana, grosera la empleada

(Translated by Google)
It gets crowded with foreigners and locals run out of fuel; the convenience store doesn't accept the YPF app; they're generally friendly, but there's a very grumpy woman on the morning shift, a rude employee
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyMkpXYlFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Limpio, ordenado. Personal muy atento..
Falta de combustible..terrible la espera .no se entiende que falta gasolina.

(Translated by Google)
Clean and tidy. Very attentive staff. Fuel shortage... terrible wait. It's incomprehensible that there's no gasoline.

reviews.comment:
Sin combustible, y cuando lo reciben a los extranjeros nos lo venden después del mediodía.  Un desastre que para ser completo le agregaron un minimercado bastante pobre

(Translated by Google)
No fuel, and when they do accept it from foreigners, they sell it to us after noon. A disaster that, to make matters worse, they added a rather poor convenience store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMybHB1b19nRRAB
